limitations: The controller uses simulation-native object pose perception and heuristic finger preshapes.
Hybrid carry and rotation are used only after stable grasp verification to keep the demo reproducible.
Finger contact values are controller contact proxies; the project does not claim perfect contact physics.

honest_note: Blind tactile mode hides object labels from controller decision logic and uses deterministic contact-feature classification. Ground truth labels are used only for evaluation.
